purpose: Prove the Env24 S3 resource-policy Allow edge is scoped to the policy principal and does not appear for an unrelated reader principal.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the Env25 S3 bucket policy.
IAMScope can parse the exact unconditioned Allow from env25-decoy to the Env25 bucket.
IAMScope can emit a s3:GetObject_resource_policy edge for the decoy principal.
IAMScope does not emit the same resource-policy edge for env25-reader when the bucket policy names only env25-decoy.
IAMScope does not need or claim generic resource-policy Deny support for this scoped-away Allow evidence.
benchmark_proves: The Env25 reader IAM user node exists in scenario.json.
The Env25 decoy IAM user node exists in scenario.json.
The Env25 S3 bucket node exists in scenario.json.
The exact Env25 decoy->bucket s3:GetObject_resource_policy edge exists in scenario.json.
The exact Env25 reader->bucket s3:GetObject_resource_policy edge is absent.
The Env25 reader path is not accidentally witnessed by an identity-policy s3:GetObject edge.
No generic RESOURCE_POLICY_DENY constraint is emitted.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove a finding-level resource-policy Allow reasoner.
It does not prove runtime S3 object readability.
It does not prove S3 PutBucketPolicy takeover through resource-policy Allow.
It does not prove Secrets Manager, KMS, or Lambda resource-policy Allow behavior.
It does not prove generic resource-policy Deny support.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: Finding-level resource-policy Allow semantics remain outside this case.
Conditioned resource-policy Allow statements remain outside this case.
Generic resource-policy Deny remains explicitly de-scoped.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM/S3 resource-policy Allow scoped-away mutation benchmark. No S3 objects are required.

ground_truth.reason: The bucket policy allows exact env25-decoy, not env25-reader, to perform s3:GetObject on the benchmark bucket objects.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env25 decoy resource-policy Allow edge exists structurally.
The exact Env25 reader resource-policy Allow edge is absent.
The Env25 decoy edge is unconditioned and has resource-policy provenance.
The Env25 reader path is not accidentally witnessed by an identity-policy s3:GetObject edge.
No generic RESOURCE_POLICY_DENY constraint is emitted.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope's S3 resource-policy Allow parser/binder/export path respects exact principal scoping on one controlled live AWS fixture.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader resource-policy Allow correctness remains only implied.
